name: ARB Review — ERC-8004 Discovery for ibn-core (Phase 1 + Phase 2)
description: ARB Review layer — FINAL (reconciled 2026-06-03 against live MITRE ATT&CK MCP, enterprise domain). T1565.002 corrected to T1565.001 (Stored Data Manipulation) post-reconciliation. Score 1.0 = in scope no coverage. 0.5 = partial. 0.1 = covered. Colour green = mitigation + detection designed in. Amber = partial. Red = gap.

techniques.comment: On-chain registry is a public technical DB; inherent recon enabler — accepted (public-by-design).
Public GitHub repo URLs cited in registration; inherent — accepted.
TMF921 endpoint advertisement enumerates business relationships; inherent — accepted.
New public route. M1051 (Dependabot) + M1050 (Helmet) inherited. Detection gap on route-level Application Log — closes via condition C5.
Well-known endpoint unauthenticated by design; TMF921 endpoint covered by existing JWT (UC007) — no new gap.
Phase 2 EOA owner key — coverage gap. Closes via C3 (K8s Secret + RBAC + DS0022).
Supply chain — covered by existing CodeQL + Dependabot CI posture; no new gap.
Phase 2 register-agent.ts script; partial detection only. C3's RBAC scoping addresses tamper vector.
Container image pipeline — inherited CodeQL/Dependabot posture; no new gap.
Host binary compromise — inherited posture; no new gap.
AGENT_OWNER_PRIVATE_KEY in .env files — coverage gap. Closes via C3.
K8s Secret theft path — coverage gap until C3 lands.
Dependency vuln credential theft — inherited Dependabot posture.
Outbound HTTPS to Base Sepolia RPC. Mitigation gap on egress policy — minor; document via plan §5.3 amendment.

HIGHEST-IMPACT TECHNIQUE for this submission (corrected from T1565.002 'Transmitted Data Manipulation' during 2026-06-03 reconciliation; on-chain tokenURI redirect is at-rest manipulation). Phase 2 leaked owner key → setAgentURI redirect. No detective control without C4 — close via on-chain tokenURI monitor + CI pinning. Canonical mitigations: M1022, M1029, M1041.
/.well-known deliberately outside /api/ rate limiter (plan §4.4). Mitigation gap — closes via C2 (dedicated limiter or CDN).
Financial Theft — deferred to Phase 3 when payment wallets are bound. Out of scope for v2.1/v2.2.
